references.text: Abu Bakar, MF Bin, AS Othman & PC Boyce. 2012. Studies on Hanguana (Commelinales: Hanguanaceae) for Sunda IV: Hanguana major clari?ed, a new species from Sarawak, Malaysian Borneo, and description of male reproductive organs in H. bakoensis. Kew Bulletin 67: 1-7.
Backer, CA. 1951. Flagellariaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 4: 248-250

Leong-Škornicková, J & MA Niissalo. 2017. Identity and typification of Hanguana malayana and H. anthelminthica and notes on other early names in Hanguanaceae. Plant Systematics and Evolution 303: 1213-1223
Niissalo MA, LS Wijedasa, PC Boyce & J Leong-Škornicková. 2014. Hanguana neglecta (Hanguanaceae): a new plant species from a heavily collected and visited reserve in Singapore. Phytotaxa 188: 14-20.

Rahman, SNBTA, AS Othman, MF Bin Abu Bakar, PC Boyce. 2010. Studies on Hanguana (Commelinales, Hanguanaceae) for Sunda II: Five new forest species from Peninsular Malaysia and recircumscription of Hanguana malayana. Willdenowia 40: 205-219

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 30 October 2023

species.citation: (Blume ex Schult. & Schult.f.) Masam. , Enum. Phanerog. Born. (1942) 81; ≡ Susum anthelminthicum Blume ex Schult. & Schult.f. , Syst. Veg., 15th Ed. 7 (1830) 1493; Type: from Java. ≠ Hanguana malayana auct. non (Jack) Merr. ; Merr., EPFP 1 (1922) 191; Backer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1951) 248; Fernando et al., Forest Flora of Dinagat (2017) 52.
species.distribution: Australia, Borneo, Java, Malay Peninsula, New Guinea, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Solomon Isls, Sri Lanka, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Thailand, Vietnam. BALABAC, DINAGAT, MINDANAO: Agusan del Sur, Lanao del Sur, Surigao, MINDORO, PALAWAN.
species.notes: Freshwater swamp, peat swamp, along lakeshores and rivers, in sluggish water, thickets behind mangroves. 0-1500m.

species.citation: Škorničk. & Niissalo , Phytotaxa 188 (2014) 15 ; Malabrigo et al., Flora of Mt Mantalingahan Protected Landscape (2023) 131; Type: from Singapore.
